Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: You can use the Formation Manager to quickly add ships back into formations if you so choose. You can try this now by clicking and dragging the tanker's Formation Manager entry back on top of the surface ship group to have it join the formation.
Options for this also exist inside the right click menu for ships and aircraft by right clicking and then clicking on Formation.
